message:
fix: circuit breaker reset race, QUIC drain idempotence + audit batches 379-383

Three bug fixes:
- error/recovery.rs (HIGH): CircuitBreaker::reset() used unconditional
  store(Closed) that could silently overwrite a concurrent HalfOpen→Open
  transition from record_failure. Fixed with CAS(HalfOpen→Closed).
- net/quic_native/transport.rs: start_draining/start_draining_with_code
  overwrote drain_deadline and close_code on repeated calls. Made
  idempotent by early-returning when already Draining.
- net/websocket/frame.rs: already committed in 90174641.

Audit batches 379-383: 16 files diff-audited (all recent commits since
db37baf8), all SOUND except the 3 bugs above. Covers trace worker-offload
events (7 files), decoding cumulative count, grpc health watch versioning,
server shutdown fetch_max, symbol test constructors, raptorq test_log_schema
type validation, plan fixtures fan-in logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
